source: Sidherun PHB 2_8_2026.docx -- two prose tables: 'Example Roll Difficulties' (Dice Rolling chapter) and 'Difficulty Targets' (Difficulty & Resolution Heuristics, inside the Skills chapter)
notes: The document contains two versions of this table. The first ('Example Roll Difficulties', Dice Rolling chapter) has only Difficulty and Target columns. The second ('Difficulty Targets', under 'Difficulty & Resolution Heuristics') repeats the same Difficulty/Target pairs and adds a 'Narrative Meaning' column. The second table is not listed in the document's own Table of Contents. Both are preserved in the prose chapters verbatim; this JSON merges them since the numbers are identical in both.
Effortless has no numeric target in either table ('No Roll (GM Discretion)' / 'No roll required').

ladder.narrative_meaning: Near the edge of mortal capability
